result.stdout:
FormatXaml.Tool 1.3.2+45c733142e58d9882157269c5a6cfed4def25464
Copyright 2024 Lixfeld

  --verbose=BOOL                        (Default: false) Show verbose messaging.

  --encoding=STRING                     (Default: utf-8) Encoding name (see .NET
                                        Encoding.GetEncoding Method).

  --extensions=LIST                     (Default: .xaml .axaml) Space separated
                                        list of file extensions.

  --indent-size=INT                     (Default: EditorConfig) Number of spaces
                                        for indentation (Fallback: 4).

  --line-ending=ENUM                    (Default: Auto) End of Line characters.
                                        Values: Auto, CRLF, LF

  --comment-indentation=ENUM            (Default: Same) Indentation level inside
                                        of multi-line comments. Values: Same,
                                        Extra

  --whitespace-before-empty-tag=ENUM    (Default: Ignore) Number of whitespaces
                                        before a closing empty tag (/>). Values:
                                        Ignore, Zero, One

  --help                                Display this help screen.

  --version                             Display version information.

  file-or-directory (pos. 0)            Required. Path of the file or directory.
